Find

      What drives us?

      At VDOT, we’re driven by many things. Service. Safety. Innovation. Collaboration. Partnership... and more. As diverse as our people and our passions, we are brought together by our drive for success. As one of the largest transportation departments in the nation, our work has immeasurable impact at home and across the industry.

      At VDOT, we have a career for whatever drives you!

      Benefits

      VDOT’s best-in-class benefits experience focuses on supporting the physical, financial, and emotional well-being of our people today and into the future. For more details on VDOT Benefits.

      Service

      Our work is tangible and meaningful. Each day, we serve the people who live and travel through Virginia by connecting communities and each other to what matters most in life.

      Collaboration

      VDOT is committed to a diverse, inclusive, and collaborative workforce. A culture of trust, respect, and accountability drives us forward together.

      Stability

      Exciting work, great people, and a commitment to work-life balance are why our people stay. Convert your job into a career at VDOT!

      We are VDOT - YouTube
      We are VDOTVirginia Department of Transportation (VDOT)
      Virginia Department of Transportation (VDOT)7.97K subscribers

      Engineering

      Our engineering roles range from early-career development to highly experienced and specialized positions, including materials, traffic engineering, environmental, and bridge specialties. Our engineers work on the entire lifecycle of a project.

      Construction

      Our construction professionals are responsible for the physical construction of our roads and bridges. Our construction teams work on projects of all sizes.

      Traffic Operations

      Our traffic operations professionals work each day to improve mobility for all modes of travel, from our signs and signals teams to our ferry operators. 

      Maintenance & Facilities

      VDOT's largest responsibility is the maintenance of our roads and the operation of our facilities. Our maintenance and facilities professionals are responsible for over 59,000 miles of roads and more than 21,000 bridges and structures.

      Students & New Graduates

      VDOT provides multiple developmental programs for students and new graduates, including internships and rotational programs. Young professionals can test knowledge in the field, solve problems, and gain hands-on experience.

      Business / Professional

      Our Business/Professional teams provide the materials, funds, and resources required to operate our transportation system. Roles include operations, executive leadership, human resources, communications, civil rights, and procurement.

      Financial Operations

      Our inventory, accounting, and public-private partnership professionals deliver key infrastructure on behalf of the Commonwealth.

      Policy & Planning

      Our environmental, legal, policy, right of way, and planning teams identify and manage transportation challenges and opportunities, working with decision makers and citizens to solve problems.

      Safety, Security and Emergency Management

      Our Safety, Security and Emergency Management professionals prepare for and respond to emergencies on our roads to keep the public safe and to keep Virginia moving.

      Science & Technology

      From automation and data science to robotics and unmanned aircraft systems, our innovative science and technology professionals are transportation leaders in research, development, and implementation.
